response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned full-stack engineer (~13+ years) with solid fundamentals, TDD discipline, and exposure to high-throughput systems at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic. However, the role targets Principal/IC6 with a specific focus on experimentation platforms, telemetry foundations, feature flighting, and statistical/measurement systems at enterprise scale — none of which appear explicitly in his background. His leadership signal is more craftsmanship/community-oriented than multi-team platform ownership, and there is no demonstrated experience building A/B testing or growth-measurement infrastructure used across teams.
strengths: 13+ years across backend, frontend, embedded, and distributed systems with languages aligned to the JD (JS/TS, C/C++, Java, C#, Python-adjacent)
Real high-scale experience at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic with low-latency services handling millions of requests/sec
Strong engineering discipline: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, open-source authorship (test runners, assertion libs), and active knowledge sharing via workshops/talks
concerns: No explicit experimentation/A-B testing, feature-flagging, guardrail metrics, or rollout-risk platform experience — the core of this role
Limited evidence of Principal/IC6-level cross-team platform ownership and stakeholder alignment across Product/DS/Research
Light on statistical analysis, bias detection, and telemetry/measurement infrastructure depth required for growth systems

key_factors.factor: Breadth and longevity of engineering experience at scale
